reason: Applied 3 review-feedback nits: (1) consolidated the duplicated 'lifecycle / builder spawn / one-shot builder image' bullet list in CLAUDE.md into a single copy; (2) added a SECURITY comment to app/api/kody/prs/preview/route.ts making explicit that the mintPreviewTicket repo is sourced from headerAuth (authenticated user context) and never from request body or query; (3) added a SECURITY comment in builder/doorman/doorman.ts near the verify flow explaining that the repo is sourced from the ticket's `r` field (HMAC-verified) and not from parseAppName(), so a future reader doesn't 'fix' the parser and break machine-to-ticket binding.
